top_signals.title: Jupiter Fund Taps Europe AI Energy Boom to Beat 92% of Peers
top_signals.summary: Homing in on stocks at the heart of Europe’s electrification push has helped a Jupiter Asset Management fund team outperform 92% of its peers this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anthropic confirms Claude Mythos-class models will roll out to the public
top_signals.summary: Anthropic has confirmed that it plans to bring Mythos-class models to the general public after delaying the rollout due to security risks to public and private software. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
